name: anonymized-real-session-replay-v1
description: Anonymized real-session-style retrieval replay fixture for Precision@k / Recall@k / nDCG@k / no-match checks.

queries.query: fast search should avoid embedding startup
queries.knownAnswer: CLI search --strategy fast uses keyword retrieval and should not start embedding model initialization.

queries.query: hook should not inject weak keyword rescue
queries.knownAnswer: Claude hook prompt injection has a separate conservative policy for high-confidence memories.
Replay benchmark reports Precision@k and Recall@k over anonymized session queries.

memories.content: CLI search --strategy fast uses keyword retrieval and should not start embedding model initialization.
Lightweight read paths initialize SQLite event-store only and avoid vector/embedder workers.
Claude hook prompt injection has a separate conservative policy for high-confidence memories.
Low-confidence keyword fallback can remain searchable but should not be injected into prompts.
Replay benchmark reports Precision@k and Recall@k over anonymized session queries.
Metric summaries average per-query precision and recall for k values one three and five.
Unrelated dashboard styling note for visual spacing.
